requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety and Building / Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全及建筑/安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全及建築／安裝審查

summary.en: Thailand BESS fire-safety obligations are usually project and site specific. Depending on location, occupancy, voltage, container layout, hazardous materials, insurer requirements, and local-authority practice, review may address separation distances, ventilation, thermal-runaway mitigation, gas detection, fire detection and suppression, emergency shutdown, access, signage, and emergency response. Do not assume battery safety testing alone closes Thai installation fire approval.
summary.zh: 泰国BESS消防安全义务通常取决于项目和场址。根据位置、建筑用途、电压、集装箱布置、危险材料、保险要求及地方主管机关实践，审查可能涉及间距、通风、热失控缓解、气体探测、火灾探测和灭火、紧急停机、通道、标识及应急响应。不应假定电池安全测试本身即可覆盖泰国安装消防批准。
summary.zht: 泰國BESS消防安全義務通常取決於項目和場址。根據位置、建築用途、電壓、集裝箱佈置、危險材料、保險要求及地方主管機關實務，審查可能涉及間距、通風、熱失控緩解、氣體探測、火災探測和滅火、緊急停機、通道、標識及應急響應。不應假定電池安全測試本身即可覆蓋泰國安裝消防批准。

standards_or_laws: Project insurer and owner fire-safety requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558, and project-specific fire design and acceptance documents for stationary energy storage. These documents may support due diligence but do not replace Thai local-authority, owner, or insurer fire-safety review.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及项目消防设计和验收文件管理固定式储能。这些文件可支持尽调，但不能替代泰国地方主管机关、业主或保险方消防安全审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及項目消防設計和驗收文件管理固定式儲能。這些文件可支持盡調，但不能替代泰國地方主管機關、業主或保險方消防安全審查。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare layout drawings, fire-protection design basis, thermal-runaway and propagation test evidence where available, ventilation and gas-detection basis, emergency shutdown logic, monitoring and alarm matrix, SDS, firefighter access information, and Thai-language emergency procedures for local review.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备布置图、消防设计依据、适用时的热失控及蔓延测试证据、通风和气体探测依据、紧急停机逻辑、监控和报警矩阵、SDS、消防通道信息以及泰文应急程序，供当地审查。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備佈置圖、消防設計依據、適用時的熱失控及蔓延測試證據、通風和氣體探測依據、緊急停機邏輯、監控和警報矩陣、SDS、消防通道資訊以及泰文應急程序，供當地審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where building, installation, fire-code, insurer, owner, or local-authority approval applies; not proven as a single national whole-BESS product certificate by this row
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

source.publisher: Department of Disaster Prevention and Mitigation, Ministry of Interior (Thailand)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Battery test reports do not close the Thai BESS fire-safety gap. Site-specific fire design, local-authority expectations, and owner or insurer requirements should be addressed before shipment and commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电池测试报告不能覆盖泰国BESS消防安全差距。出货和调试前，应处理场址特定消防设计、地方主管机关预期以及业主或保险方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電池測試報告不能覆蓋泰國BESS消防安全差距。出貨和調試前，應處理場址特定消防設計、地方主管機關預期以及業主或保險方要求。
